concept: Solidarity / The Deliberate Path of Shared Mind
description: The deep commitment to mutual support and shared struggle across differences. It is the conscious choice to link fates and stand with others in their pursuit of collective liberation.
rationale: Composed entirely from our established roots: 'the' (deliberate consideration), 'no' (mind), and 'la' (path). The word's structure means 'the deliberate path of a shared mind.' This frames solidarity as a conscious, intentional, and active process of alignment. The fricative and flowing sounds give it a feeling of both serious commitment and active support.
